steps.label: LOAD — 20 UCL matches today (live RMA-FCB + 18 finished + 1 upcoming)
steps.expected: Open the date menu on today: the panel lists 20 UEFA Champions League matches — Real Madrid vs Barcelona live (37', 1-1, minute column filled), 18 finished internationals with their scores (blank minute), and Tottenham vs Feyenoord upcoming with its kick-off time. Cold-start suppresses notifications for the already-finished/in-progress matches.

steps.label: HOLD — inspect the panel; press [q]+Enter to finish (Enter just reloads the same day)
steps.expected: The 15 matches stay on screen while you scroll/hover. Pressing q ends the run and removes the test subscription.
